examples.label: Parse in VCard with MBS functions:
examples.text_code:
# Loop over files on desktop
Set Variable [
$folder
; Value:
MBS
( "
Folders.UserDesktop
" ) ]
Set Variable [
$files
; Value:
MBS
( "
Files.List
";
$folder
; 1+4; ".vcf" ) ]
If [
MBS
("IsError") = 0 ]
Set Variable [
$count
; Value: ValueCount (
$files
) ]
Set Variable [
$index
; Value: 1 ]
If [
$count
> 0 ]
Loop
# Read in vcard
Set Variable [
$filename
; Value: GetValue(
$files
;
$index
) ]
Set Variable [
$filepath
; Value:
MBS
( "
Path.AddPathComponent
";
$folder
;
$filename
) ]
Set Variable [
$text
; Value:
MBS
( "Text.ReadTextFile";
$FilePath
; "UTF-8" ) ]
If [
MBS
("IsError") = 0 ]
Set Variable [
$text
; Value:
MBS
( "
Text.ReplaceNewLine
";
$text
; 1) ]
# Process all text lines
Set Variable [
$LineCount
; Value: ValueCount (
$text
) ]
Set Variable [
$LineIndex
; Value: 1 ]
# TODO: Create new record here
Loop
Set Variable [
$Line
; Value: GetValue(
$text
;
$lineindex
) ]
If [ Left (
$line
; 2 ) = "N:" ]
# Name
Set Variable [
$z
; Value: Middle (
$line
; 3; Length (
$line
)) ]
Set Variable [
$list
; Value:
MBS
( "
List.CSVSplit
";
$z
) ]
Set Variable [
$FirstName
; Value: GetValue(
$list
; 1) ]
Set Variable [
$SureName
; Value: GetValue(
$list
; 2) ]
Set Field [
CON::nameGiven
;
$firstName
]
Set Field [
CON::nameFamily
;
$sureName
]
Else If [ Left(
$line
; 6) = "EMAIL;" ]
# TODO
Else If [ Left(
$line
; 27) = "PHOTO;ENCODING=b;TYPE=JPEG:" ]
# Photo as base64 coded JPEG:
Set Variable [
$data
; Value: Middle (
$line
; 28; Length (
$line
)) ]
Set Variable [
$LineIndex
; Value:
$LineIndex
+ 1 ]
Loop
Set Variable [
$Line
; Value: GetValue(
$text
;
$lineindex
) ]
Exit Loop If [ Left (
$line
; 1 ) ≠ " " ]
Set Variable [
$data
; Value:
$data
& ¶ &
$line
]
# next
Set Variable [
$LineIndex
; Value:
$LineIndex
+ 1 ]
Exit Loop If [
$LineIndex
>
$LineCount
]
End Loop
Set Variable [
$LineIndex
; Value:
$LineIndex
- 1 ]
Set Variable [
$image
; Value: Base64Decode (
$data
; "image.jpg" ) ]
Set Field [
CON::imageOrLogo
;
$image
]
End If
# next
Set Variable [
$LineIndex
; Value:
$LineIndex
+ 1 ]
Exit Loop If [
$LineIndex
>
$LineCount
]
End Loop
# TODO: Commit record
End If
# next
Set Variable [
$index
; Value:
$index
+ 1 ]
Exit Loop If [
$index
>
$count
]
End Loop
End If
End If
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Loop over files on desktop</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Folders.UserDesktop" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$folder</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Files.List"; $folder; 1+4; ".vcf" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$files</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS("IsError") = 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>ValueCount ( $files ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$count</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>1 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$index</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $count > 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <FlushType value="Always"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Read in vcard</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>GetValue($files; $index) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$filename</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Path.AddPathComponent"; $folder; $filename ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$filepath</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Text.ReadTextFile"; $FilePath; "UTF-8" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$text</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> MBS("IsError") = 0 </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Text.ReplaceNewline"; $text; 1) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$text</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Process all text lines</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>ValueCount ( $text ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$LineCount</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>1 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$LineIndex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> TODO: Create new record here</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <FlushType value="Always"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>GetValue($text; $lineindex) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Line</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> Left ( $line ; 2 ) = "N:" </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Name</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Middle ( $line ; 3; Length ( $line )) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$z</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "List.CSVSplit"; $z ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$list</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>GetValue($list; 1) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$FirstName</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>GetValue($list; 2) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$SureName</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$firstName </Calculation>
    <Field table="CON" id="99999" name="nameGiven "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$sureName </Calculation>
    <Field table="CON" id="99999" name="nameFamily "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="125" name="Else If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> Left($line; 6) = "EMAIL;" </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> TODO</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="125" name="Else If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> Left($line; 27) = "PHOTO;ENCODING=b;TYPE=JPEG:" </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Photo as base64 coded JPEG:</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Middle ( $line ; 28; Length ( $line )) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$data</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$LineIndex + 1 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$LineIndex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="71" name="Loop">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <FlushType value="Always"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>GetValue($text; $lineindex) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Line</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation> Left ( $line ; 1 ) ≠ " " </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$data & ¶ & $line </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$data</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> next</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$LineIndex + 1 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$LineIndex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation> $LineIndex > $LineCount </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$LineIndex - 1 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$LineIndex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Base64Decode ( $data; "image.jpg" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$image</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$image </Calculation>
    <Field table="CON" id="99999" name="imageOrLogo "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> next</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$LineIndex + 1 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$LineIndex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation> $LineIndex > $LineCount </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> TODO: Commit record</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> next</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>$index + 1 </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$index</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="72" name="Exit Loop If">
    <Calculation> $index > $count </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="73" name="End Loop"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Read and write file to change some text:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$path
; Value: "/Users/cs/Desktop/test.txt" )]
# read the file
Set Variable [
$text
; Value:
MBS
( "Text.ReadTextFile";
$path
; "UTF-8")]
# replace something in the text
Set Variable [
$text
; Value: Substitute(
$text
; "Hello"; "World") ]
# write file
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
Text.WriteTextFile
";
$text
;
$path
; "UTF-8")]

functions.name: Text.ReadTextFromContainer
functions.description: Reads content of container value as text. You need to be sure it is text and the text encoding. Else you may get garbage.

parameters.name: Container
parameters.description: The container field or variable containing container value.

parameters.name: Encoding
parameters.description: The text encoding for result. Default is native. This function can also handle UTF-16 as well as UTF-16LE and UTF-16BE for little/big endian byte order. Possible encoding names: ANSI, ISO-8859-1, Latin1, Mac, Native, UTF-8, DOS, Hex, Base64 or Windows. More listed in the FAQ .

examples.label: Reads text from container:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Text.ReadTextFromContainer"; test::test; "UTF8" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Extract text from gzip compressed text with prefixed length:
examples.text_code:
# get some response string, gzip compressed with length before
// Set Variable [
$response
; Value:
GzipDecompress::InputString
]
Set Variable [
$response
; Value: "RAAAAB+LCAAAAAAABACrZlBicGbIZ0hhSAWyrBhMGAwYDBl0gOwwhkSGHIZSqLgSEIJEg4BqSxlKkE RrGQAjtv6kRAAAAA==" ]
# convert base64 to Hex
Set Variable [
$hex
; Value:
MBS
( "
Text.DecodeHexFromBase64
";
$response
) ]
# now we can remove the first 4 bytes with length
Set Variable [
$hexNum
; Value: Left(
$hex
; 8) ]
Set Variable [
$Rest
; Value: Middle (
$hex
; 9; 100000000 ) ]
# we can decode the length value
Set Variable [
$len
; Value:
MBS
("
Math.DecodeNumber
"; "Integer"; 32;
$hexNum
) ]
# and read to container value from hex
Set Variable [
$Cont
; Value:
MBS
( "
Container.DecodeFromHex
"; "FILE";
$Rest
; "test.gz" ) ]
# now decompress gzip
Set Variable [
$Decompressed
; Value:
MBS
( "
Archive.GZipDecompress
";
$cont
; "test.txt") ]
# and read it as text. it is little endian UTF-16 here!
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "Text.ReadTextFromContainer";
$Decompressed
; "UTF-16LE") ]
# show in field
Set Field [
GzipDecompress::OutputString
;
$result
]
Show Custom Dialog [ "Result" ;
$result
]
Example result:
{
"Code"
:
401
,
"Value"
:
""
,
"Route"
:
""
}
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> get some response string, gzip compressed with length before</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="False" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>GzipDecompress::InputString </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$response</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"RAAAAB+LCAAAAAAABACrZlBicGbIZ0hhSAWyrBhMGAwYDBl0gOwwhkSGHIZSqLgSEIJEg4BqSxlKkE RrGQAjtv6kRAAAAA==" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$response</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> convert base64 to Hex</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Text.DecodeHexFromBase64"; $response ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$hex</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> now we can remove the first 4 bytes with length</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Left($hex; 8) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$hexNum</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Middle ( $hex; 9; 100000000 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Rest</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> we can decode the length value</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("Math.DecodeNumber"; "Integer"; 32; $hexNum) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$len</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> and read to container value from hex</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Container.DecodeFromHex"; "FILE"; $Rest; "test.gz" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Cont</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> now decompress gzip</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Archive.GZipDecompress"; $cont; "test.txt") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Decompressed</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> and read it as text. it is little endian UTF-16 here!</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Text.ReadTextFromContainer"; $Decompressed; "UTF-16LE") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> show in field</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$result </Calculation>
    <Field table="GzipDecompress" id="99999" name="OutputString "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation> "Result" </Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>$result </Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: Text.RedefineEncoding
functions.description: Takes a text in a given encoding and reencodes it with other encoding. This can be used to fix bad imported texts. This function works on pure  text, so any text style is lost.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The text to process.

parameters.name: InputEncoding
parameters.description: The text encoding for the input text. Possible encoding names: ANSI, ISO-8859-1, Latin1, Mac, Native, UTF-8, DOS, Hex, Base64 or Windows. More listed in the FAQ .

parameters.name: OutputEncoding
parameters.description: The text encoding for the resulting string. Possible encoding names: ANSI, ISO-8859-1, Latin1, Mac, Native, UTF-8, DOS, Hex, Base64 or Windows. More listed in the FAQ .

examples.label: Fix umlaut in Mac encoded UTF-8 text:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">

[Char(8205);""]; // 200D zero width joiner

[Char(8287);" "]; // 205F medium mathematical space
[Char(8288);""]; // 2060 word joiner
[Char(8289);""]; // 2061 function application
[Char(8290);""]; // 2061 invisible times
[Char(8291);""]; // 2062 invisible separator
[Char(8292);""]; // 2063 invisible plus
[Char(65279);""] // FEFF zero width space
)

functions.name: Text.RemoveControlCharacters

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The text to process.

    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>

functions.name: Text.RemoveNewLine
functions.description: Removes newline characters from string. FileMaker has a text replace command, but can't process all combinations of newline characters with it. As this function removes all newlines independent of whether you have CR, LF or CRLF in any combination. We needed this for a client in combination with WebView.RunJavaScriptReturnTitle . An older version of Internet Explorer made trouble with newline characters inside javascript text, so we removed them. This function works on pure  text, so any text style is lost.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The text to process.

examples.label: Remove newlines from field
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Text.RemoveNewLine"; Test Database::TextField )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Creates directory and shows error:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
Files.CreateDirectory
";
$path
)]
If [
MBS
("IsError")]
Show Custom Dialog ["Failed to create directory";
MBS
("Text.RemovePrefix";
$r
; "[
MBS
] ")]
Exit Script []
End If
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("Files.CreateDirectory"; $path)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation>MBS("IsError")</Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>"Failed to create directory"; MBS("Text.RemovePrefix"; $r</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>"[MBS] ")</Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="103" name="Exit Script">
    <Calculation/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: Text.ReplaceAll
functions.description: Find & Replace all occurrences of a text. Quickly looks for all occurrences of a given text in another text and replaces it with a new text. Optimized code for extra speed if you replace one character with another character. This function works on pure  text, so any text style is lost.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The text to search.

parameters.name: Find
parameters.description: The text to find.

parameters.name: ReplaceWithText
parameters.description: The new text.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: Text.ReplaceNewLine
functions.description: Replaces newline characters. Can remove, convert to Mac, Windows and Linux specific end of line characters. Also can remove duplicates. FileMaker uses Mac line endings on all platforms. Like ReplaceLineEndings in Xojo to replace line breaks. This function works on pure text, so any text style is lost. And it truncates on first NULL byte.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The text to process.

parameters.name: Mode
parameters.description:
The operation mode. First a value for the output newline type: 0: nothing 1: CR (Mac) 2: LF (Unix) 3: CRLF (Windows) 4:
for html 5:
for xml Second you can add 8 to remove duplicate newlines.

parameters.name: Wrap
parameters.description: Optional whether to wrap lines longer than given number of characters. Default is 0 for no wrap.

examples.label: Remove newlines from field:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Text.ReplaceNewline"; Test Database::TextField; 0 )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Replaces newlines from field with Mac newlines:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Text.ReplaceNewline"; Test Database::TextField; 1 )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Replaces newlines from field with Mac newlines and remove duplicates:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Text.ReplaceNewline"; Test Database::TextField; 1+8 )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Write UTF-8 CRLF file:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$text
; Value: "Joe,1234 Main St.¶John Glen,3132 Elm¶Johnson,5233 Wreybird¶Ray,263 Birch¶äöü" ]
Set Variable [
$path
; Value: "/Users/cs/Desktop/test.txt" ]
Set Variable [
$text
; Value:
MBS
( "Text.ReplaceNewline";
$text
; 3) // CRLF ]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
Text.WriteTextFile
";
$text
;
$path
; "UTF8" ) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"Joe,1234 Main St.¶John Glen,3132 Elm¶Johnson,5233 Wreybird¶Ray,263 Birch¶äöü" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$text</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"/Users/cs/Desktop/test.txt" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$path</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Text.ReplaceNewline"; $text; 3) // CRLF </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$text</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Text.WriteTextFile"; $text; $path; "UTF8" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Change line endings for a text file:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$path
; Value: "/Users/cs/Desktop/test.txt" ]
Set Variable [
$text
; Value:
MBS
("
Text.ReadTextFile
";
$path
; "UTF-8") ]
Set Variable [
$text
; Value:
MBS
("Text.ReplaceNewline";
$text
; 3) ]
# 1 = CR for Mac
# 2 = LF for Linux
# 3 = CRLF for Windows
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
Text.WriteTextFile
";
$text
;
$path
; "UTF-8") ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"/Users/cs/Desktop/test.txt" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$path</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("Text.ReadTextFile"; $path; "UTF-8") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$text</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("Text.ReplaceNewline"; $text; 3) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$text</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 1 = CR for Mac</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 2 = LF for Linux</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> 3 = CRLF for Windows</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("Text.WriteTextFile"; $text; $path; "UTF-8") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: Text.RightTrim
functions.description: Trims whitespace on the right side. May remove low ASCII characters like tab, CR, LF and space. Also removes alt-space and delete character. This function works on pure text, so any text style is lost.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The text to trim.

examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Text.RightTrim"; " ¶ Hello ¶ ")</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>

functions.name: Text.Serialize
functions.description: Serializes styled text as text. The styled text content is stored in a base64 encoded string which the plugin function Text.Deserialize can read. Using this function allows to store a styled text in a text field or transmit it with Socket functions, SerialPort functions or by writing it to a file. See also Text.Styles and Text.FromStyles to serialize with JSON.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The styled text to serialize.

functions.name: Text.Styles
functions.description: Queries style information as JSON. Returns a JSON array with objects containing details. Includes booleans hasColor, hasFont, hasSize and hasFace to inform you which features are available for text block. If hasColor is true, you can get color (numeric), colorHex (string) and values in range 0 to 255 for red, blue, green and alpha. If hasFont is true, you can get fontID, fontScript and font with the name. If hasSize is true, the size field contains the size of the font in points. If hasFace is true, you get the face as integer. We also provide bold, italic, underline, outline, shadow, condense, extend, strikethrough, smallCaps, superscript, subscript, wordUnderline and doubleUnderline as booleans. See also Text.FromStyles function to do the reverse.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The styled text to check.

examples.label: Check some text:
examples.text_code:
MBS
("Text.Styles"; TextColor ( "Hello" ; RGB ( 255 ; 0 ; 0 ) ))
Example result:

,

:
"FF0000"
,

:
255
,

:
0
,

:
0
,
"alpha"
:
255
,
"hasFont"
: false,
"hasSize"
: false,
"hasFace"
: false,
"text"
:
"Hello"
,
"start"
:
1
}
]
examples.xml_code:

examples.label: Process bold and italic to markdown:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>While(
	[
		m = "";
		i = 0;
		j = MBS( "Text.Styles"; Test::Input );
		c = MBS( "JSON.GetArraySize"; j )
	];
	i < c;
	[
		e = MBS( "JSON.GetArrayItem"; j; i );
		text = JSONGetElement( e; "text" );
		IsBold = JSONGetElement( e; "bold" );
		IsItalic = JSONGetElement( e; "italic" );
		m = m & If( IsItalic; "_" );
		m = m & If( IsBold; "**" );
		m = m & text;
		m = m & If( IsBold; "**" );
		m = m & If( IsItalic; "_" );
		i = i + 1
	];
	m
)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Change colors in styled text:
examples.text_code:
# styled text to JSON
Set Variable [
$json
; Value:
MBS
("Text.Styles";
Test::Input
) ]
#  # change all red to 123
Set Variable [
$json
; Value:
MBS
("
JSON.Replace
";
$json
; "$..red"; 123) ]
#  # change all green to 0
Set Variable [
$json
; Value:
MBS
("
JSON.Replace
";
$json
; "$..green"; 0) ]
#  # convert back to styled text
Set Field [
Test::Output
;
MBS
("
Text.FromStyles
";
$json
) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> styled text to JSON</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("Text.Styles"; Test::Input) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$json</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>  # change all red to 123</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("JSON.Replace"; $json; "$..red"; 123) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$json</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>  # change all green to 0</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("JSON.Replace"; $json; "$..green"; 0) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$json</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text>  # convert back to styled text</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("Text.FromStyles"; $json) </Calculation>
    <Field table="Test" id="99999" name="Output "/>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: Text.TextToHTML
functions.description:
Creates HTML text for a given FileMaker formatted styled text. Supports styles like bold, italic, underline, font size and text color. Other style features may be added in the future on demand. See also Text.EncodeToHTML and GetAsCSS in FileMaker. Version 11.2 adds support for strikethrough using s tag in html. Version 12.0 adds superscript and subscript style for HTML. Version 13.1 adds flag 32 to use

instead of

for two returns in the text in a style run. See also Text.HTMLtoStyledText function.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: Formatted text to convert.

parameters.name: Options
parameters.description: The options number for html creation. Add 1 for having no body around. Add 2 to have no font names. Add 4 to have no font sizes. Add 8 to use strong instead of b tag for bold. Add 16 to keep links in HTML to pass through tags. (new in 7.4). Add 32 to use paragraphs. (new in 13.1)

    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: Text.Tidy
functions.description: Performs tidy on XML or HTML. Sets error log, which can be queried with Text.TidyErrorLog function. Returns new XML or HTML back after repairing. For options, check this website: https://api.html-tidy.org/tidy/tidylib_api_5.8.0/tidy_quickref.html Use XML.Colorize to apply colors if needed. By default we apply options to use utf-8 for input and output as encoding. Line endings use Char(13) as FileMaker does and we disable the tidy mark for the html header.

parameters.name: Input
parameters.description: The input text. Can be broken HTML or XML.

parameters.name: Options
parameters.description: The tidy options as JSON object.

functions.name: Text.WriteTextFile
functions.description: Writes a text file with the given text. You have to decide which encoding to use (if not native). We support a few encodings, but we can add more if you need something special. Please use Text.ReplaceNewLine to define which line endings the file has. In order to append to a text file, you can use Text.AppendTextFile instead. If text encoding doesn't support given characters, they are converted to close match if possible or replaced by question marks. Existing file is overwritten if permissions allow it. Added support for UTF-16 in plugin version 7.2. You can pass UTF-16, UTF-16LE or UTF-16BE for encoding. See Text.ReadTextFile for reading text files. If you need to create directory first, please use Files.CreateDirectory function. This function requires a native path. Use Path.FileMakerPathToNativePath to convert a FileMaker path to a native path if required. If you like to have the user choose the path, you can use FileDialog functions. For Server be aware that server has limited permissions and may not be able to access all files on a computer.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The text to save.

parameters.name: FilePath
parameters.description: The native file path. Something like "/Users/cs/desktop/test.txt" on Mac and "C:\Programs\Data\test.txt" on Windows. Files without path end in the root directory on Mac.

parameters.name: Encoding
parameters.description: The text encoding for text parameter. Default is native. Possible encoding names: ANSI, ISO-8859-1, Latin1, Mac, Native, UTF-8, DOS, Hex, Base64 or Windows. More listed in the FAQ .

    </Value>

      <Calculation>1</Calculation>

  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Write a HTML file and an image file to load in web viewer:

Hello World

" ] Set Variable [ $path ; Value: MBS ( " Path.AddPathComponent "; $folder ; "test.html" ) ] Set Variable [ $r ; Value: MBS ( "Text.WriteTextFile"; $html ; $path ) ] # Set Variable [ $URL ; Value: MBS ( " Path.FilePathToFileURL "; $Path ) ] Set Web Viewer [ Object Name: "web" ; URL: $URL ]

    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"<html><body><p>Hello World</p><img src=test.jpg width=300></body></html>" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$html</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Path.AddPathComponent"; $folder; "test.html" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$path</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>

    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Path.FilePathToFileURL"; $Path ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$URL</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="146" name="Set Web Viewer">
    <Action value="GoToURL"/>
    <ObjectName>
      <Calculation>"web"</Calculation>
    </ObjectName>
    <URL custom="False">
      <Calculation>$URL </Calculation>
    </URL>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: Text.WriteToContainer
functions.description: Write a text as a FILE in a container. The result can be assigned to a container field and later be exported. This function works on pure  text, so any text style is lost.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The text to save.

parameters.name: Encoding
parameters.description: The text encoding for text parameter. Default is native. Possible encoding names: ANSI, ISO-8859-1, Latin1, Mac, Native, UTF-8, DOS, Hex, Base64 or Windows. More listed in the FAQ .

parameters.name: FilePath
parameters.description: The file name to include in the container value.

examples.label: Writes some text to container:
examples.text_code:
Set Field [
MyTable::Test
; Value:
MBS
("Text.WriteToContainer"; "Hello World"; "UTF-8"; "test.txt") ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>Value: MBS("Text.WriteToContainer"; "Hello World"; "UTF-8"; "test.txt") </Calculation>
    <Field table="MyTable" id="99999" name="Test"/>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: Text.ZLibCompress
functions.signature: MBS( "Text.ZLibCompress"; Input; InputEncoding; OutputEncoding { ; FileName; Flags } )
functions.description: Compresses the given data using lib. Can optional do raw zlib without header and checksum. If you implement TarDoc in the Swiss (Swiss medical billing standards for 2026), you need the raw option.

parameters.name: Input
parameters.description: The input. Can be a container value or text.

parameters.name: InputEncoding
parameters.description: The input encoding. e.g. UTF-8, Hex, Base64. The default for text is UTF-8.

parameters.name: OutputEncoding
parameters.description: How to package the output. Can be Hex, Base64 or Container.

parameters.name: FileName
parameters.description: For a container as output the file name to use.

parameters.name: Flags
parameters.description: Pass 1 for raw compression.

examples.label: Compress some text:
examples.text_code:
MBS
( "Text.ZLibCompress"; "Hello Hello World Hello"; "UTF-8"; "Base64")
Example result:
eNrzSM3JyVfwAJPh+UU5KRA2AGH1CEU=
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Text.ZLibCompress"; "Hello Hello World Hello"; "UTF-8"; "Base64")</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Compress some text with raw:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Text.ZLibCompress"; "Hello Hello World Hello"; "UTF-8"; "Base64"; ""; 1)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Compress and decompress with containers:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Let([
  // compress a container with a RTF file
  c = MBS( "Text.ZLibCompress"; MyDatabase::ContainerField; ""; "Base64" );

  // decompress it again and put it back in container
  d = MBS( "Text.ZLibDecompress"; c; "Base64"; "Container"; "test.rtf" )
]; d)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: Text.ZLibDecompress
functions.signature: MBS( "Text.ZLibDecompress"; Input; InputEncoding; Output { ; FileName or Encoding; Flags } )
functions.description: Decompresses the given data using lib. Can optional do raw zlib without header and checksum.

parameters.name: Input
parameters.description: The compressed data. Can be a container value, hex or base64 text.

parameters.name: InputEncoding
parameters.description: The input encoding. If you pass text as input, you can pass here Hex or Base64.

parameters.name: Output
parameters.description: How to package the output. Can be Text, Hex, Base64 or Container.

parameters.name: FileName or Encoding
parameters.description: For a container as output the file name to use. For a text output the text encoding.

parameters.name: Flags
parameters.description: Pass 1 for raw compression.

examples.label: Decompress compressed data:
examples.text_code:
MBS
( "Text.ZLibDecompress"; "eNrzSM3JyVfwAJPh+UU5KRA2AGH1CEU="; "Base64"; "Text"; "UTF-8")
Example result:
Hello Hello World Hello
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Text.ZLibDecompress"; "eNrzSM3JyVfwAJPh+UU5KRA2AGH1CEU="; "Base64"; "Text"; "UTF-8")</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: TOTP.Calculate
functions.signature: MBS( "TOTP.Calculate"; Key; TimeNow; TimeStart; TimeStep; DigitCount { ; Algorithm; DecodeBase32 } )
functions.description: Calculates a Time-based one-time password. Uses SHA-1 as hash algorithm. The result is returned as number and may miss leading zeros, if you just convert it to text.

parameters.name: Key
parameters.description: The secret to use.

parameters.name: TimeNow
parameters.description: The current time. In seconds.

parameters.name: TimeStart
parameters.description: The start time. In seconds.

parameters.name: TimeStep
parameters.description: The step value defining the duration the code is valid. In Seconds.

parameters.name: DigitCount
parameters.description: The number of digits to generate. Ranges usually from 4 to 9.

parameters.name: Algorithm
parameters.description: The algorithm to use. Can be empty, SHA1, SHA256 or SHA512. Default is SHA1 if nothing is passed.

parameters.name: DecodeBase32
parameters.description: Whether the password is base32 encoded and should be decoded.

examples.label: Calculate a code:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$code
; Value:
MBS
( "TOTP.Calculate"; "12345678";
MBS
("
TOTP.CurrentTime
"); 0; 30; 6 ) ]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "TOTP.Calculate"; "12345678"; MBS("TOTP.CurrentTime"); 0; 30; 6 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$code</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Test the function with SHA-1:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Let([
key = "12345678901234567890";
TimeNow = 59;
TimeStep = 30;
TimeStart = 0;
Digits = 8;
r = MBS( "TOTP.Calculate"; Key; TimeNow; TimeStart; TimeStep; Digits )
]; r)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: TOTP.DecodeFromBase32
functions.description: Decode a base 32 string. This is for text only.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The text to process.

parameters.name: Encoding
parameters.description: The text encoding for result. Default is UTF-8.

examples.label: Decode it:

  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">

    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: TOTP.EncodeToBase32
functions.description: Encode a base32 string. Please check what text encoding you want to use. Especially what the software processing the base32 string expects. Based on RFC 3548 and RFC 4648.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: The text to process.

parameters.name: Encoding
parameters.description: The text encoding for text parameter. Default is UTF-8.

examples.label: Encode Hello
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "TOTP.EncodeToBase32"; "Hello World")</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Encode test string:
examples.text_code:
MBS
( "TOTP.EncodeToBase32"; "The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.")
Example result:
KRUGKIDROVUWG2ZAMJZG653OEBTG66BANJ2W24DTEBXXMZLSEB2GQZJANRQXU6JAMRXWOLQ=

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">

    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: UNNotification.Action
functions.description: Queries identifier of action. If this notification had an action triggered, the action identifier is returned. Else an empty result is returned.

parameters.name: UNNotificationRef
parameters.description: The reference number of the notification.

functions.name: UNNotification.AddFile
functions.description: Adds an attachment to the notification. Path can be a picture file, an audio file or a movie file. As the system takes the file, you may want to make a copy in a temp folder first.

parameters.name: UNNotificationRef
parameters.description: The reference number of the notification.

parameters.name: Path
parameters.description: The native file path for the file.

parameters.name: Identifier

functions.name: UNNotification.AuthorizationError

functions.name: UNNotification.AuthorizationGranted

parameters.name: UNNotificationRef

functions.name: UNNotification.IsRegisteredForRemoteNotifications
functions.description: Checks whether we can get remote notifications. Returns 1 if the application is currently registered for remote notifications, taking into account any systemwide settings; doesn't relate to connectivity.

examples.label: Check registration state:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>"Check registration state"</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>MBS( "UNNotification.IsRegisteredForRemoteNotifications" )</Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: UNNotification.NotificationSettings
functions.description: Checks notification settings. You can pass "update" to query new settings. This may be needed to know about changes the user may have made. Pass "AuthorizationStatus" to get authorization status. Can be NotDetermined, Denied and Authorized. Pass "alertStyle" to query alert style. Can be None, Banner or Alert. Pass "soundSetting", "badgeSetting", "alertSetting", "notificationCenterSetting", "lockScreenSetting" or  "carPlaySetting" to query settings. Can be NotSupported, Disabled or Enabled. For MBS Plugin 9.1 or newer, you can also pass providesAppNotificationSettings (1 or 0), showPreviewsSetting (Always, WhenAuthenticated, Never) and criticalAlertSetting (NotSupported, Disabled, Enabled) to query those.

parameters.name: Selector

parameters.name: UNNotificationRef
parameters.description: The reference number of the notification.

examples.label: Create location trigger and query back values:
examples.text_code:
# Create a new notification
Set Variable [
$notification
; Value:
MBS
("
UNNotification.New
")]
# Set Title and Body
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
UNNotification.SetTitle
";
$notification
; "Hello")]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
UNNotification.SetBody
";
$notification
; "Greetings from FileMaker")]
# set a location trigger
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "
UNNotification.SetLocationTrigger
";
$Notification
; 37,354444; -121,969167; 50000; "Santa Clara area")]
# and query back trigger settings
Set Variable [
$value
; Value:
MBS
("UNNotification.Region";
$notification
)]
Set Variable [
$value
; Value:
MBS
("
UNNotification.Repeats
";
$notification
)]
# and schedule
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
UNNotification.Schedule
";
$notification
; "test")]

functions.name: UNNotification.RemoteNotificationsDeviceToken
functions.description: Queries device token. If the registration for remote notifications is successful, this function will return the hex encoded device token. You can pass the device token to your server sending the push notifications. Text is empty if registration failed. e.g. "416204F694DA65CC1AFD9E473C7E44C22DD66B61FD4DA61B255A89EE436B6F61" See UNNotification.RemoteNotificationsError for the reason. For this to work, your application must have entitlements for remote notifications. To add the required entitlements to your app, enable the Push Notifications capability in your Xcode project, in the Signing and Capabilities section. Enabling this option in iOS adds the APS Environment Entitlement to the app. In macOS, it adds the APS Environment (macOS) Entitlement. There error message would be: no valid "aps-environment" entitlement string found for application. For the plugin being able to request remote notification, you need to link in MBSInit.framework, which makes sure the plugin is loaded earlier. You can query UNNotification.DidMBSInit to see if the initialization happened and use UNNotification.RemoteNotificationsCallbackReceived to see if the callback arrived. Both functions are currently not documented. For MacOS the plugin can't register for remote notifications as FileMaker Pro misses the required entitlement.

examples.label: Show device token:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="87" name="Show Custom Dialog">
    <Title>
      <Calculation>"Device Token"</Calculation>
    </Title>
    <Message>
      <Calculation>MBS("UNNotification.RemoteNotificationsDeviceToken")</Calculation>
    </Message>
    <Buttons>
      <Button CommitState="True">
        <Calculation>"OK"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False">
        <Calculation>"Cancel"</Calculation>
      </Button>
      <Button CommitState="False"/>
    </Buttons>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: UNNotification.Schedule

functions.name: UNNotification.SetActionScript
functions.description: Sets which script to call when a notification’s action is triggered. Called for both local and remote notifications. Parameter to the script is a list with first the ID of the notification and second the action identifier. The notification is a new object (copy), so you get a new identifier. Use UNNotification.AddUserInfo if you need to pass on data with the notification like a record ID. Use UNNotification.AddUserInfo to associate your own values with the notifications, which you can then use in the triggered script.

parameters.name: FileName
parameters.description: The database file name where the script is located.

parameters.name: ScriptName
parameters.description: The script name.

examples.label: Sets action script:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "UNNotification.SetActionScript"; Get(Filename); "NotificationActionTriggered" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: UNNotification.SetCalendarDateTrigger
functions.description: Sets a calendar based trigger. Can be scheduled on the device to notify based on date and time values. Will schedule to run at the given date and time.

parameters.name: UNNotificationRef
parameters.description: The reference number of the notification.

parameters.name: TimeStamp
parameters.description: The time stamp for the date and time to use.

functions.name: UNNotification.SetCalendarTrigger
functions.signature: MBS( "UNNotification.SetCalendarTrigger"; UNNotificationRef { ; Year; Month; Day; Hour; Minute; Second; Repeat } )
functions.description: Sets a calendar based trigger. Can be scheduled on the device to notify based on date and time values, and optionally repeat. For example, if a notification should be delivered at the next 8:00 AM then set the 'hour' parameter to 8. If the notification should be delivered every day at 8:00 AM then set repeats to 1.

parameters.name: UNNotificationRef
parameters.description: The reference number of the notification.

parameters.name: Year
parameters.description: The year to use. Can be empty.

parameters.name: Month
parameters.description: The month to use. Can be empty.

parameters.name: Day
parameters.description: The day to use. Can be empty.

parameters.name: Hour
parameters.description: The hour to use. Can be empty.

parameters.name: Minute
parameters.description: The minute to use. Can be empty.

parameters.name: Second
parameters.description: The second to use. Can be empty.

parameters.name: Repeat
parameters.description: Whether to repeat. Can be 1 to enable or 0 to disable. Default is 0.

examples.label: Repeat daily 8am:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "UNNotification.SetCalendarTrigger"; $NotificationRef; ""; ""; ""; 8; ""; ""; 1 )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: UNNotification.SetLocationTrigger
functions.signature: MBS( "UNNotification.SetLocationTrigger"; UNNotificationRef; Latitude; Longitude; Radius; Identifier { ; Repeat } )
functions.description: Sets a location trigger. Can be scheduled on the device to notify when the user enters or leaves a geographic region. The identifier on region must be unique. Scheduling multiple notifications with different regions containing the same identifier will result in undefined behavior. The number of location triggers that may be scheduled by an application at any one time is limited by the system. Applications must have "when-in-use" authorization through CoreLocation.

parameters.name: UNNotificationRef
parameters.description: The reference number of the notification.

parameters.name: Latitude
parameters.description: The latitude of the region center.

parameters.name: Longitude
parameters.description: The longitude of the region center.

parameters.name: Radius
parameters.description: The radius of the circular region in meter.

parameters.name: Identifier
parameters.description: The user displayable identifier for the region.

parameters.name: Repeat
parameters.description: Whether to repeat this notification. Pass 1 to enable or 0 to disable. Default is 0.

examples.label: Create location trigger and query back values:
examples.text_code:
# Create a new notification
Set Variable [
$notification
; Value:
MBS
("
UNNotification.New
")]
# Set Title and Body
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
UNNotification.SetTitle
";
$notification
; "Hello")]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
UNNotification.SetBody
";
$notification
; "Greetings from FileMaker")]
# set a location trigger
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "UNNotification.SetLocationTrigger";
$Notification
; 37,354444; -121,969167; 50000; "Santa Clara area")]
# and query back trigger settings
Set Variable [
$value
; Value:
MBS
("
UNNotification.Region
";
$notification
)]
Set Variable [
$value
; Value:
MBS
("
UNNotification.Repeats
";
$notification
)]
# and schedule
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
UNNotification.Schedule
";
$notification
; "test")]

functions.name: UNNotification.SetNFCScript
functions.description: Sets NFC trigger script. If you use Background Tag Reading for NFC tags with CoreNFC framework, you can call this function in start script to define the script to trigger. You need to add an associated domain to your iOS application. See https://developer.apple.com/documentation/security/password_autofill/setting_up_an_app_s_associated_domains

parameters.name: FileName
parameters.description: The database file name where the script is located.

parameters.name: ScriptName
parameters.description: The script name.

examples.label: Sets action script:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "UNNotification.SetNFCScript"; Get(Filename); "NFC Detected" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: UNNotification.SetScript
functions.description: Sets which script to call when a notification is presented. Called for both local and remote notifications. Parameter to the script is he ID of the notification. The notification is a new object (copy), so you get a new identifier. Use UNNotification.AddUserInfo if you need to pass on data with the notification like a record ID. Use UNNotification.AddUserInfo to associate your own values with the notifications, which you can then use in the triggered script. With plugin version 6.0 or newer the script name can be a script ID number. In that case the plugin queries the script name for the given script ID. This allows to call scripts by ID and avoid problems if scripts are later renamed. Notice: FileMaker 19.2 adds a fmplugin extended privileges. If you have such an extended privileges to allow the plugin to trigger scripts, you need to grant permissions for it. If such a privilege is not defined, the plugin is allowed to trigger scripts. See FileMaker product documentation for details.

parameters.name: FileName
parameters.description: The database file name where the script is located.

parameters.name: ScriptName
parameters.description: The script name.

examples.label: Sets script:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "UNNotification.SetScript"; Get(Filename); "NotificationReceived" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: UNNotification.Title
functions.description: Queries title of notification.

parameters.name: UNNotificationRef
parameters.description: The reference number of the notification.

examples.label: Try title:
examples.text_code:
# Create a new notification
Set Variable [
$notification
; Value:
MBS
("
UNNotification.New
")]
# set a title
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
UNNotification.SetTitle
";
$notification
; "Hello")]
# and query back
Set Variable [
$title
; Value:
MBS
("UNNotification.Title";
$notification
)]
# free memory
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
UNNotification.Release
";
$notification
)]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Create a new notification</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("UNNotification.New")</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$notification</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> set a title</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("UNNotification.SetTitle"; $notification; "Hello")</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> and query back</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("UNNotification.Title"; $notification)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$title</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> free memory</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("UNNotification.Release"; $notification)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: UNNotification.Type
functions.description: Queries type of notification. Can be Push, Calendar, Interval, Location or nothing. As type is defined by trigger, a new notification without a trigger returns empty result.

parameters.name: UNNotificationRef
parameters.description: The reference number of the notification.

examples.label: Query type
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "UNNotification.Type"; $Notification )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: UNNotification.UserInfoKeys
functions.description: Queries keys for user info. You can pass data with push or local notifications and later query it here.

parameters.name: UNNotificationRef
parameters.description: The reference number of the notification.

functions.result: Returns list of keys or error.

examples.label: List all keys available:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "UNNotification.UserInfoKeys"; $Notification )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: UNNotification.UserInfoValue
functions.description: Queries value for given key in user info.

parameters.name: UNNotificationRef
parameters.description: The reference number of the notification.

parameters.name: Key
parameters.description: The key to lookup.

examples.label: Query record ID:
examples.text_code:
MBS
( "UNNotification.UserInfoValue";
$Notification
; "RecordID" )
# you need to earlier put the value in the user info!
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "UNNotification.UserInfoValue"; $Notification; "RecordID" )
# you need to earlier put the value in the user info!</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>
